title: Survival Enhanced
description: This mod pack is designed to improve the gameplay of Minecraft Survival and make it even more fun to play. ✨
body:
# Survival Enhanced
This modpack is optimised for private Survival servers and **should not be used on public servers**, as some of the mods may not comply with the server rules. 
**Also, some mods, such as the Simple Voice Chat mod, require special setup on the server.**

This modpack aims to achieve to make the gameplay more comfortable for the player. 

- Various shaders (BSL, Bliss, Solas)
- New Content (Biomes O' Plenty, Do a Barrel Roll)
- Optimation mods (Sodium, Sodium Extra)
- QoL mods (Better Ping or Ok Zoomer, Simple Voice Chat, Bobby)
- Other enhancements (Wavey capes, Sound Physics Remastered)
